target_client.website_status: Static WordPress - Slider Revolution + Owl Carousel + Swiper.js. Zero cinematic motion.

sprint_goal: Build a cinematic homepage concept as an open-book pitch.
deliverables: DONE: xbd_homepage_architecture.md established as the Master Plan
DONE: Section 1 - The Threshold (WebGL shader Preloader, GSAP dissolve, Lenis lock)
DONE: Section 2 - The Hero (Update Scene 1 text, hard cut gradient)
DONE: Section 3 - Philosophy Bridge (Deck Transition, 3D text roll)
DONE: Section 4 - The Disciplines (3 Macro-to-Micro disciplines layout)
DONE: Section 5 - The Team (Populated with transparent PNGs, refined layout)
DONE: Section 6 - The Concierge (2-column compact form, animated typography, unified cream background)
DONE: Footer (Compact Sub-footer, optimized spacing, correct GSAP triggers)
DONE: Section 7 - Proof Moment (Middle Path: Inline Video between Disciplines and Team)
notes: DECISION MADE: Phase 7 'Middle Path' implemented with the solar house inline video moment. Now moving to Phase 8 Final Review & Polish.
key_decisions: Adopted a new 6-section emotional arc architecture (xbd_homepage_architecture.md) as the absolute source of truth.
Pivoted entirely to a Light Theme (Limestone #F7F5F2 & Espresso #2C2621).
Used unconditional `grid grid-cols-2` for the Concierge form to guarantee short vertical height across all viewport sizes, solving user frustration with 'two screenshot' mobile flex stacking.
Tied the Concierge background to the Philosophy background (`bg-xbd-bg-alt`) for brand cohesion.
Phase 7 Decision: Opted for the 'Middle Path' — one inline silent video moment instead of a full gallery, preserving the scalpel-like focus of the pitch.
blockers: Need to design the entrance/exit transitions and layout for the Phase 7 inline video.
